user_goal: 按 MVP PRD 推进 Global ETF Momentum 的可复现研究闭环：在 B008 研究级数据基础上，实现手动、默认禁用、CI 不依赖的公开数据导入与本地 snapshot workflow，补齐 snapshot manifest、显式数据加载、质量门禁和 research run artifact，同时继续保持 no-live/no-secret/no-network-by-default/no-broker/no-AI safety guards。

evaluator_feedback.summary: B009 F006 L1 verification found one blocking acceptance gap: snapshot manifests are generated by public import, but backtest/research-run artifacts do not reference the manifest file or manifest snapshot_id. Required checks otherwise pass: pytest 59 passed, ruff, compileall, mypy. Move to fixing; no signoff issued.

findings.issue: Snapshot manifests are generated but not referenced by backtest/research-run artifacts.
findings.evidence: trade/data/public_import.py writes *-manifest.json; trade/reporting/reports.py build_research_run_artifact records data_snapshot_id/checksum/source/date_range but no manifest path or manifest snapshot_id. Evidence artifact /tmp/opencode/b009-f006/run/b009-explicit-snapshot-research-run.json contains no manifest reference.
findings.required_fix: Propagate and record manifest_file and manifest snapshot_id, or equivalent manifest reference, in JSON report and research-run artifact for imported snapshots; add tests proving imported snapshot artifacts reference the manifest.

generator_handoff: Generator completed B009 F001-F005. F001 added manual-only public data import CLI boundary in trade.data.public_import: default/legacy callers fail closed, explicit confirmation flag is required, no network/credential imports are introduced, and confirmed imports only copy local files into gitignored data/public-cache. F002 added snapshot manifest generation beside imported local files with provider/source, timestamp, tickers, date range, row count, file hash/path, data source policy, and public-best-effort/non-PIT/research-only/not-live-trading-ready labels. F003 added explicit WorkflowConfig.snapshot_path loading via load_snapshot_prices; defaults still use committed fixtures, missing snapshots fail closed, and non-local snapshot paths are rejected without fallback, network, secret, or broker access. F004 added imported snapshot quality/report labels including snapshot_kind, imported_snapshot_data, public-best-effort, non-PIT, research-only, and not-live-trading-ready in JSON/Markdown reports. F005 added reproducible research run artifact JSON linking strategy config, snapshot reference, quality summary, backtest report paths, and portfolio-compatible target weights while remaining broker-free and human-review-only. Full local checks pass: .venv/bin/python -m pytest (59 passed), .venv/bin/python -m ruff check ., .venv/bin/python -m compileall trade tests, and .venv/bin/python -m mypy --install-types --non-interactive trade. Evaluator should run F006 independent L1 verification and produce signoff.

session_notes.planner: 2026-05-13: B008 was done with clean signoff. User agreed to next batch recommendation from MVP PRD perspective: B009 Public Data Snapshot MVP. Created spec and feature list; moved status to building for Generator F001. Key intent is to bridge synthetic fixture mechanics to reproducible local research snapshots while preserving offline CI and safety guards.
session_notes.generator: 2026-05-13: Completed B009 F001-F005 and moved status to verifying for F006. Added manual public import boundary, snapshot manifests, explicit snapshot loader, imported data quality/report labels, and research run artifact JSON. Full local checks pass: pytest 59 passed, ruff, compileall, mypy. No network/secret/broker/paper/live/AI trading path introduced.
session_notes.evaluator: 2026-05-13: B009 F006 L1 verification FAIL. Checks passed (pytest 59, ruff, compileall, mypy), and safety/default boundaries mostly pass. Blocking gap B009-F006-1: generated snapshot manifests are not referenced by JSON/research-run artifacts. Review report: docs/test-reports/B009-public-data-snapshot-mvp-review-2026-05-13.md. Status moved to fixing; no signoff.
